overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a foggy, industrial urban environment at night. The character moves from under a highway overpass through an intersection and along a sidewalk illuminated by orange street lamps, with dystopian industrial architecture and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass

events.description: character briefly shifts right to navigate around other pedestrians in the crowd

agents.ego_description: following a character in a light-colored jacket through a crowd of pedestrians under a highway overpass

notable_agents.action: walking forward under the overpass, leading the way through the crowd

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass spanning across the walkway above
yellow metal guardrail separating sidewalk from the road
gray concrete pavement with visible seams and cracks
tall palm tree visible through the fog in the distance
tall street lamp emitting white light through the haze

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a highway overpass in a foggy urban environment. The camera follows a character in a light jacket through a moderate crowd of pedestrians walking along a concrete sidewalk. Yellow metal railings line the right side, and street lamps cast artificial light through the haze.

events.description: exits covered overpass into open intersection with visible sky and distant buildings
UI notification 'NORTHSIDE' appears indicating entry to new district
black sedan drives through the intersection as character crosses the street

agents.ego_description: navigating across the street at an intersection, moving from covered walkway to open sidewalk on the opposite side

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: dark asphalt street with yellow lane markings and crosswalk lines
tall pole with traffic signal and pedestrian crossing light
row of parked vehicles along the right side of the street
large industrial structure with flat roof and minimal windows visible through fog

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered overpass into an open intersection. The environment transitions from sheltered to exposed, with orange street lamps illuminating the fog. The character crosses the asphalt road as a black sedan drives through, and a UI notification indicates entry to the 'NORTHSIDE' district.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk with overhead utility pipes

events.description: enters open sidewalk alongside industrial buildings with overhead pipe structures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the industrial sidewalk, following distant pedestrians through the foggy street

entered.detail: chain-link fence with barbed wire running along the top of the building wall
large industrial pipes and conduits spanning across the street overhead
street lamp emitting warm orange light cutting through the dense fog
scattered cardboard boxes and litter strewn across the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open industrial sidewalk flanked by a tall concrete building with security fencing on the left and a road with sparse traffic on the right. Overhead industrial pipes span the street, and orange street lamps create a dystopian atmosphere through the heavy fog. Trash and debris litter the concrete path as the character follows distant pedestrians into the hazy distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy urban landscape that transitions from a sheltered overpass into an exposed industrial district. It begins beneath a highway overpass, following a character in a light jacket through a crowd of pedestrians along a concrete sidewalk lined with yellow metal railings. As the character exits the covered area, the scene opens into a wide intersection where orange street lamps illuminate the haze and a black sedan passes by while a notification marks the entry into Northside. The camera then shifts to follow the character along an open industrial sidewalk, flanked by a tall concrete building with security fencing and overhead pipes spanning the street. Finally, the view extends past litter-strewn concrete and sparse traffic, trailing distant pedestrians as they disappear into the heavy, dystopian fog.
